assessment_name: AI Sales Assistant — Phase 2: Cloud Infrastructure API Scan
notes: AWS API scan completed 2026-03-19. Enumerated IAM, Secrets Manager, VPC, CloudWatch, S3, ECR across us-east-1 and eu-west-1. Merges with Phase 1 topology results. 8 controls with cloudApiTier=manual are excluded from automated workflow — add manually for full audit.

responses.notes: AWS ECS DescribeServices confirmed 4-container task definition: orchestrator + 3 sub-agents. Task ARN: arn:aws:ecs:us-east-1:123456789012:service/ai-sales-cluster/orchestrator-svc. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:02:11Z.
AWS API Gateway ListResources enumerated 12 tool endpoints. All routes verified with IAM auth. API ID: ai-sales-tools-api (us-east-1). Last verified 2026-03-19T06:02:11Z.

AWS API confirmed Pinecone index pinecone-sales-v3 (us-east-1) + ElastiCache cluster for session context. Context window config in SSM Parameter Store: /ai-sales/model/context-window=128000. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:02:11Z.
AWS VPC DescribeVpcs + DescribeSecurityGroups confirmed internal-only SG on agent message bus. No public ingress rules. SG ID: sg-0a1b2c3d4e5f6a7b8. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:02:11Z.
AWS ECR DescribeImages confirmed 4 container images with pinned digests. SBOM generation not detected in pipeline. Manual verification of third-party SDK licenses required.

AWS IAM GetRole confirmed dedicated execution roles for each agent: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/ai-sales-orchestrator-role, arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/ai-sales-subagent-role. OIDC-based token federation confirmed. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:05:33Z.

AWS IAM ListUsers + GetAccountSummary confirmed MFA enforced on all 12 human users via IAM policy arn:aws:iam::123456789012:policy/EnforceMFA. Okta SSO integration via SAML confirmed. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:05:33Z.

AWS IAM SimulatePrincipalPolicy confirmed least-privilege: orchestrator role limited to ecs:RunTask, ssm:GetParameter, secretsmanager:GetSecretValue. No admin or wildcard actions. ARN: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/ai-sales-orchestrator-role. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:05:33Z.
AWS IAM API detected session policy support on agent roles. Dynamic scope reduction at runtime not yet implemented — STS AssumeRole with inline session policy available but not applied per-request.

AWS Secrets Manager ListSecrets confirmed 8 secrets with automatic rotation enabled (30-day). No secrets in environment variables. ARNs: arn:aws:secretsmanager:us-east-1:123456789012:secret/ai-sales/*. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:05:33Z.

AWS IAM confirmed session token MaxSessionDuration=3600s on all agent roles. Token revocation via IAM policy condition key aws:TokenIssueTime confirmed. ARN: arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/ai-sales-orchestrator-role. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:05:33Z.
AWS SSM GetParameter confirmed model config: model=gpt-4o-2024-08-06, provider=openai. Model card URL stored in /ai-sales/model/card-url. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:08:44Z.
AWS API confirmed OpenAI as sole model provider. Training data provenance delegated to OpenAI model card. Internal fine-tuning dataset audit trail not present — base model only confirmed.
AWS ECR + SSM confirmed no fine-tuning pipeline or RLHF adapter in deployment. Base gpt-4o-2024-08-06 only. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:08:44Z.

AWS CodePipeline ListPipelines confirmed CI/CD pipeline ai-sales-model-pipeline with change approval stage. Model version pinned in SSM: /ai-sales/model/version=gpt-4o-2024-08-06. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:08:44Z.

AWS IAM confirmed model API key stored in Secrets Manager with access restricted to arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/ai-sales-orchestrator-role. No other roles have GetSecretValue on /ai-sales/openai-key. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:08:44Z.

AWS API Gateway confirmed request validator on all routes + WAF WebACL arn:aws:wafv2:us-east-1:123456789012:regional/webacl/ai-sales-waf attached. Prompt injection rules active. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:11:55Z.

AWS Lambda confirmed output validation function ai-sales-output-validator (Node 20.x) invoked on every agent response. PII redaction + grounding check confirmed in function config. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:11:55Z.
AWS ECS confirmed Fargate launch type with no host network mode. Task-level security groups isolate each agent container. SG IDs per agent confirmed. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:11:55Z.

AWS VPC DescribeNetworkAcls + DescribeSecurityGroups confirmed agent subnet isolated with no internet gateway. NACLs deny all inbound from 0.0.0.0/0. VPC ID: vpc-0x1234abcd. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:11:55Z.

AWS Lambda confirmed tool wrapper functions validate all tool return schemas before passing to orchestrator. Schema validation config in SSM: /ai-sales/tools/validation-mode=strict. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:11:55Z.

AWS IAM confirmed data boundary policy restricts agent roles to S3 bucket arn:aws:s3:::ai-sales-data-prod/* only. No access to other buckets confirmed via policy simulation. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:11:55Z.

AWS Step Functions DescribeStateMachine confirmed HITL wait-for-callback state on high-risk transitions. State machine ARN: arn:aws:states:us-east-1:123456789012:stateMachine:ai-sales-workflow. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:14:06Z.

AWS ECS + Lambda confirmed kill-switch Lambda ai-sales-emergency-stop with IAM allow for on-call role. Step Functions abort confirmed. ARN: arn:aws:lambda:us-east-1:123456789012:function:ai-sales-emergency-stop. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:14:06Z.

AWS AppConfig confirmed agent guardrail config ai-sales-guardrails with 5 scope limits deployed. Feature flag rollout confirmed. ARN: arn:aws:appconfig:us-east-1:123456789012:application/ai-sales. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:14:06Z.
AWS API confirmed AI disclosure header injected via Lambda@Edge on all responses. User acknowledgement audit log format requires human review for GDPR transparency compliance documentation.

AWS SQS ListQueues confirmed escalation queue ai-sales-escalation-queue with PagerDuty subscription. Dead-letter queue configured at 3 retries. ARN: arn:aws:sqs:us-east-1:123456789012:ai-sales-escalation-queue. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:14:06Z.

AWS Config ListAggregateDiscoveredResources confirmed 4 third-party service integrations. Formal vendor risk assessments for OpenAI, Pinecone, Twilio, and Salesforce not detected in automated scan — require human documentation.

AWS CodePipeline confirmed change approval stage with manual approval action required before model/prompt deploys. Change log in CloudTrail: arn:aws:cloudtrail:us-east-1:123456789012:trail/ai-sales-audit-trail. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:17:22Z.
AWS CloudWatch LogGroups confirmed /aws/ecs/ai-sales-orchestrator with 90-day retention. Structured JSON logging with trace IDs on all agent actions. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:17:22Z.

AWS CloudTrail DescribeTrails confirmed ai-sales-audit-trail with S3 log validation enabled. CloudWatch Logs integration active. ARN: arn:aws:cloudtrail:us-east-1:123456789012:trail/ai-sales-audit-trail. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:17:22Z.

AWS CloudWatch confirmed Anomaly Detection on 3 agent metrics (invocation count, error rate, latency). Behavioral baseline window: 2 weeks. Full UEBA coverage requires additional manual threshold tuning.
AWS CloudWatch Dashboard ai-sales-model-health confirmed drift metrics: token distribution, latency p99, error rate with 5% threshold alarms. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:17:22Z.
AWS X-Ray confirmed distributed tracing active across all agent nodes. Full explainability output (chain-of-thought logging) requires application-level configuration beyond what API scan can confirm.
AWS CloudWatch confirmed Kinesis Firehose delivery stream to S3 for SIEM ingestion. SIEM platform (Splunk) confirmed as destination but parsing rules require human validation.
AWS Macie confirmed data classification active on ai-sales-data-prod S3 bucket. Sensitivity labels: PII, Confidential, Internal detected and tagged. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:20:33Z.
AWS IAM + S3 bucket policies confirmed agent role has access to 3 of 47 data buckets matching sales domain only. Macie confirmed no unintended data access. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:20:33Z.
AWS Macie confirmed PII detection active. Formal GDPR processing records and data subject rights procedures require human documentation review.

AWS S3 LifecycleConfiguration confirmed 90-day retention on agent logs, 365-day on audit trail. CloudWatch log group retention: 90 days. ARN: arn:aws:s3:::ai-sales-data-prod. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:20:33Z.
AWS Config confirmed S3 Transfer Acceleration + CloudFront distribution restricted to EU/US regions only. SCPs deny data writes to prohibited regions. Last verified 2026-03-19T06:20:33Z.
